summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of blog platform MVP - all core functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: Homepage loads with 'The Journal' title, search bar, and category filters
Admin login works with correct password (admin123) and redirects to dashboard
Admin login shows error with wrong password
Blog creation works with title, excerpt, category, and rich text content
Created blogs appear on admin dashboard with edit/delete controls
Created blogs appear on public homepage as blog cards
Blog detail pages load correctly with full content and metadata
Blog editing functionality works - can modify title and save changes
Blog deletion works with confirmation dialog
Category filtering works (All, Technology categories tested)
All API endpoints return correct status codes and data
Image upload and processing works (base64 storage, auto-resize)
Admin authentication with sessionStorage works correctly
